steps.title: Identify two clear points on the line of best fit
steps.content: Examine the line of best fit drawn through the scatterplot. The line passes through the lower left and upper right of the plot. Reading from the graph, the line appears to pass through approximately $(0, 2.5)$ and $(10, 4.5)$.

steps.title: Apply the slope formula
steps.content: Use the slope formula with these two points: $$m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{4.5 - 2.5}{10 - 0} = \frac{2}{10} = 0.2$$ To refine further, observe additional points on the line—at $x = 2$, the line is near $y = 2.9$; at $x = 8$, the line is near $y = 4.3$: $$m = \frac{4.3 - 2.9}{8 - 2} = \frac{1.4}{6} \approx 0.233$$ Both calculations yield a slope very close to $0.22$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
